---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/ocicrypt (github.com/containers/ocicrypt)</summary>

### [`v1.3.1`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/ocicrypt/releases/tag/v1.3.1): ocicrypt v1.3.1

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/ocicrypt/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1)

##### What's changed:

- pkcs11: Add missing support for pkcs11 to SortDecryptionKeys
- Regenerate the protobuf code to stop using deprecated github.com/golang/protobuf
- Update dependencies

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/containers/ocicrypt/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1>

</details>
